_comment: Target OSS repositories for the UML-evolution trace family. Each entry's `puml_glob` is the path pattern (relative to the repo root) where PlantUML files live. Verify with `gh repo view <repo>` or `git ls-files` before running mine.py — repo layouts shift over time. The `dataset_url` field is reserved for a direct Lindholmen / Hebig mirror should one resurface; if non-null it overrides the per-repo mining.

repos.rationale: Spec evolution; small diagrams; clean PlantUML usage co-located with the asciidoc source.
Mature Java framework with rich architectural diagrams in framework-docs; long history.
Component-level architecture diagrams maintained alongside docs.
TypeScript framework; class and dependency diagrams.
API surface diagrams in PlantUML, frequent revision.

validation_notes: Run `git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/<slug>.git cache/<slug>` and `git ls-files | grep -E '\.(puml|plantuml)$'` to confirm each repo currently contains PlantUML files. If empty, drop or replace.
If fewer than 3 of the 5 repos have usable PlantUML history, broaden the glob to also include `*.plantuml` and `*.uml` extensions, or add fallback repos from https://github.com/topics/plantuml.
Keep total commit count across all repos under ~250 for the first sweep; the harness scales linearly per transition.
